name: MCP News Feed
description: News about MCP, AI agents, MCP servers, tool integrations, security, developer tooling, and enterprise AI adoption.

articles.title: AI agents have a spec for paying and a spec for hiring. The spec for trading is missing.
articles.summary: On June 23, Circle published the official USDC specification for the Machine Payments Protocol. The mechanics are elegant: an agent calls an MPP-enabled endpoint, the server answers with HTTP 402 Payment Required, the agent signs an EIP-3009 USDC authorization and retries, and Circle Gateway...

articles.title: MCP clients can't easily authenticate with Entra. Here's the bridge.
articles.summary: If you work in a company using AI and MCPs, you put an MCP server on the network. You realize you need auth. articles.title: MCP vs Traditional API Integration: A Side-by-Side Cost and Latency Comparison
articles.summary: Every team building an AI agent in 2026 faces the same debate. One person says “let’s use MCP,” and another says “we already have a REST API, why change.” Both are right, and that’s the real issue.The choice is not about which protocol is better. articles.title: How an Unbounded fastmcp Version Constraint Took Down Production with 421 Misdirected Request
articles.summary: We run a Model Context Protocol server on Cloud Run, built with fastmcp, sitting behind a custom domain on an HTTPS load balancer. It hadn't been redeployed in three months. When we finally shipped a routine release, every single request started failing with 421 Misdirected Request. No code...

articles.summary: I stopped sending lazy prompts to my coding agent — and the fix grew into a self-hosted layer that routes, remembers, and meters everything. articles.title: Apple just turned Safari into something AI agents can control

articles.title: Agent Runs now available in the Vercel MCP and CLI
articles.summary: Your agent can now inspect Agent Runs via the Vercel MCP and CLI for eve, the open-source agent framework.eve traces are automatically ingested when deployed to Vercel and available as Agent Runs. The new Vercel MCP tools and Vercel CLI commands let you find projects with runs, list recent runs,...
articles.author: Brooke Mosby

articles.title: Announcing the Monetization Gateway: charge for any resource behind Cloudflare via x402
articles.summary: We're opening the waitlist for our Monetization Gateway, which will allow you to charge for any web page, dataset, API, or MCP tool behind Cloudflare. The charges will settle in stablecoins over the x402 open protocol, with no payments stack of your own to build.
articles.author: Will Papper

articles.title: Beta SDKs for the 2026-07-28 MCP Spec Release Candidate Are Here
articles.summary: Beta releases of the Python, TypeScript, Go, and C# SDKs are now available with support for the 2026-07-28 MCP specification release candidate. Here is what changes for your server, how to migrate, and how to test before the spec goes final on July 28.

articles.title: MCP for Beginners: Why Every AI Engineer and Developer Should Learn the Model Context Protocol

articles.title: MCP Server Authorization with Azure API Management: From Simple to Advanced
articles.summary: Why put API Management in front of your MCP servers The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has quickly become the standard way for AI agents, such as GitHub Copilot in VS Code, to reach external tools and data. articles.author: vzisiadis

articles.title: Enterprise-Managed Authorization: Zero-touch OAuth for MCP
articles.summary: The Enterprise-Managed Authorization extension to the Model Context Protocol is now stable, enabling organizations to centrally provision MCP server access through their identity provider so users get connected servers on first login without per-app OAuth.
